items.briefing:
A currently unpatched zero-day vulnerability in Microsoft Exchange is being actively exploited, meaning attackers could target Australian organisations using Exchange email servers right now — with no fix yet available. All staff should be alert to suspicious emails or unusual account activity and report anything out of the ordinary to IT immediately.

Separately, research continues to show that Australian small and medium businesses are adopting AI tools faster than they're securing them, with security concerns now the top barrier to broader AI adoption. If your organisation uses AI tools, check with your IT team that approved, secure options are in place before using new ones.

**Tip:** If you use Microsoft Exchange for email, contact your IT team today to confirm whether any protective measures have been applied.
